creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Tue Jan 22 00:52:42 2013

URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/310788

Log:
  - Update to 0.13.1
  - Update maintainer email address

  Submitted by:	Robert Gogolok <gogo@cs.uni-sb.de> (maintainer)

Modified: head/sysutils/rubygem-god/Makefile

+++ head/sysutils/rubygem-god/Makefile	Tue Jan 22 00:52:42 2013	(r310788)
@@ -5,11 +5,11 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	god
-PORTVERSION=	0.12.1
+PORTVERSION=	0.13.1
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils rubygems
 MASTER_SITES=	RG
 
-MAINTAINER=	gogo@cs.uni-sb.de
+MAINTAINER=	gogolok+freebsd@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Monitoring framework written in Ruby
 
 RUN_DEPENDS=	rubygem-hoe>=1.3.0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-hoe
